programmes.show_description: Krithi is stepping into the Desi Dancefloor Mix from Brooklyn, New York and blending the slickest sounds.

programmes.show_description: Join Duaa Karim on a journey of music as she curates her Ultimate Eid Playlist. Featuring Maher Zain, Sachet Tandon and Sami Yusaf - Duaa takes you on a journey.

programmes.show_name: The Everyday Hustle with Harleen Nottay
programmes.show_description: As part of the BBC's AI Unpacked, AI entrepreneur Aftab Malhotra joins Harleen Nottay. He discusses where the technology is currently and how it can help you and your business.

programmes.show_name: The Everyday Hustle with Harleen Nottay
programmes.show_description: Anam Mohammed joins Harleen Nottay to discuss how she set up her own PR and event company. Anam shares the moment she knew she had to become an entrepreneur.

programmes.show_name: Asian Network Motivation with Sarover Aulja
programmes.show_description: Sarover explores breaking generational expectations and choosing yourself. A motivational mix of South Asian hits and global anthems about redefining success and owning your path.

DJ Kizzi soundtracks your Saturday nights with the biggest and best tunes, Asian anthems and mixes.

programmes.show_description: Dee and Rav are stepping into the mix and bringing those powerhouse anthems from iconic females in the industry. Expect music from Jasmine Sandlas, Tyla, Rouge and Kanika Kapoor.

programmes.show_name: Asian Network's Club Hit Squad Mix

Gagan pays tribute to Bollywood's timeless female voices, honouring the women whose unforgettable songs have defined eras and shaped some of Bollywood's most iconic moments!

programmes.show_name: Asian Network Bollywood with Gagan Grewal
programmes.show_description: Are you ready for some Alia Bhatt anthems with Gagan Grewal? He's spinning Alia classics plus timeless hits from Shreya Ghoshal and Atif Aslam, all marking their March birthdays!
